title: Sticky Foundations
description: API for Guwy's mods and a few small items/mechanics
body:
Sticky Foundations is not a mod by itself. It adds items, tools, mechanics that are shared by the GuwyTheSlimeBoi's Mods and acts as a bridge between mods that require connected behaviour.

 
---

**This Mod Requires**
- Forge
- Create Mod (it runs without but you won't be able to craft most of the items)

---

**Current Features**
- Ores
- Base Crafting Items
- Water Pressure Mechanics (Off by default, check configs)
- Air Desity and Breathable Air at High Altitudes Mechanics (Off by default, check configs)
- Helmet Gunk accumulation for some other mods (mechanism, create, pneumaticcraft)

---

**API Features**
- Onscreen messages API
- Gunk Accumulating Helmets API
- Number to Text Formatter
- Easy Item Tags Injector
